MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order Granting Petition To Authorize Approval Of Restated Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions Of Harbor View Villas Unit Ii Condominium Association [Civil Code 4275]
Off Calendar Oct-28-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPARANCES:
Nicholas Rogers, 925.838.2090 of O'Toole Rogers, LLP appearing via Zoom for Petitioner Harbor View Villas Unit II Condominium.
No other appearances.

Hearing held. The Court rules as follows: PETITIONER HARBOR VIEW VILLAS UNIT II CONDOMINIUM MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order Granting Petition To Authorize Approval Of Restated Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions Of Harbor View Villas Unit Ii Condominium Association [Civil Code 4275] is Granted.
